translation.literal_translation: Not even from numerical aggregation, because of heterogeneity and because of excess. (11)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.11: Sankhya identification from numerical grouping is invalid; the proposed set is internally non-homogeneous and contextually over-inclusive relative to the 25-tattva claim.
translation.interpretive_note: Two-pronged filter: structural mismatch plus counting overflow.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Literal keeps compact sutra cadence and may be adjusted for English smoothness.
Technical summary depends on reading of the adjacent long bhashya block.
